description: Get overall conversion metrics for the sign-up to premium upgrade funnel

example.code:
# After running any funnel analysis function
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Overall conversion rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")
print(f"Total users analyzed: {summary['total_users']}")
print(f"Funnel completion rate: {summary.get('funnel_completion_rate', 'N/A')}")

parameters.analysis_name: Name of the specific funnel analysis (optional)

description: Show summary statistics for new user onboarding funnel

example.code:
# After running any funnel analysis function
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Onboarding completion rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")
print(f"Average time to complete: {summary.get('avg_completion_time', 'N/A')} minutes")
print(f"Drop-off at each step: {summary.get('step_dropoff_rates', 'N/A')}")

parameters.analysis_name: Name of the specific funnel analysis (optional)

description: Provide an overview of the checkout process conversion metrics

example.code:
# After running any funnel analysis function
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Checkout completion rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")
print(f"Total revenue from completed checkouts: ${summary.get('total_revenue', 0):,.2f}")
print(f"Average checkout time: {summary.get('avg_checkout_time', 'N/A')} minutes")

parameters.analysis_name: Name of the specific funnel analysis (optional)

description: Summarize the conversion rates for the sign-up funnel

example.code:
# After running any funnel analysis function
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Sign-up completion rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")
print(f"Drop-off at email verification: {summary.get('dropoff_at_email_verification', 'N/A')}%")
print(f"Most common drop-off point: {summary.get('biggest_dropoff_step', 'N/A')}")

parameters.analysis_name: Name of the specific funnel analysis (optional)

description: Get a high-level view of feature adoption funnel performance

example.code:
# After running any funnel analysis function
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Feature adoption rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")
print(f"Most common drop-off point: {summary.get('biggest_dropoff_step', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Time to adoption: {summary.get('avg_time_to_adoption', 'N/A')} days")

parameters.analysis_name: Name of the specific funnel analysis (optional)

description: Compare conversion rates between mobile and desktop users

example.code:
# After running analyze_funnel_by_segment
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='conversion_rate',
    baseline_segment='desktop'
)(cohort_pipe)
print("Mobile vs Desktop conversion comparison:")
print(comparison)
print(f"Mobile conversion rate: {comparison.get('mobile', {}).get('conversion_rate', 'N/A')}%")
print(f"Desktop conversion rate: {comparison.get('desktop', {}).get('conversion_rate', 'N/A')}%")

parameters.metric_column: Column containing the metric to compare
parameters.baseline_segment: Segment to use as baseline for comparison (optional)

description: Analyze how checkout completion rates differ across browser types

example.code:
# After running analyze_funnel_by_segment
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='checkout_completion_rate',
    baseline_segment='chrome'
)(cohort_pipe)
print("Browser comparison for checkout completion:")
print(comparison)
print(f"Chrome completion rate: {comparison.get('chrome', {}).get('checkout_completion_rate', 'N/A')}%")
print(f"Firefox completion rate: {comparison.get('firefox', {}).get('checkout_completion_rate', 'N/A')}%")

parameters.metric_column: Column containing the metric to compare
parameters.baseline_segment: Segment to use as baseline for comparison (optional)

description: Compare sign-up success rates across different marketing channels

description: Find differences in subscription renewal rates between pricing tiers

example.code:
# After running analyze_funnel_by_segment
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='renewal_rate',
    baseline_segment='basic_tier'
)(cohort_pipe)
print("Pricing tier comparison for renewal rates:")
print(comparison)
print(f"Basic tier renewal rate: {comparison.get('basic_tier', {}).get('renewal_rate', 'N/A')}%")
print(f"Premium tier renewal rate: {comparison.get('premium_tier', {}).get('renewal_rate', 'N/A')}%")

parameters.metric_column: Column containing the metric to compare
parameters.baseline_segment: Segment to use as baseline for comparison (optional)

description: Measure how abandonment rates vary between new and returning users

example.code:
# After running analyze_funnel_by_segment
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='abandonment_rate',
    baseline_segment='returning_users'
)(cohort_pipe)
print("New vs Returning users abandonment comparison:")
print(comparison)
print(f"New users abandonment rate: {comparison.get('new_users', {}).get('abandonment_rate', 'N/A')}%")
print(f"Returning users abandonment rate: {comparison.get('returning_users', {}).get('abandonment_rate', 'N/A')}%")

parameters.metric_column: Column containing the metric to compare
parameters.baseline_segment: Segment to use as baseline for comparison (optional)
